THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEUNG, JAMIN W.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOWERS, THOMAS HAN, SHARRY (SUED AS SHERRY) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2422 24TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94116 $1,800.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF JAMIN YEUNG'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. SETTLEMENT ENFORCED, ANY DEFAULT BY PLAINTIFF WAS CURED WHEN DEFENDANT ACCEPTED LATE TENDER OF $2,300.00. THE COURT HAS NO AUTHORITY TO MODIFY THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ENTITLED TO POSSESSION OF THE UNIT AS OF 12/31/06 AND DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PAY PLAINTIFF THE DECEMBER RENT OF $1,800.00. (302/PB/JF) JUDGE: PETER J. Notice Of Motion & Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jan-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
JAIME MAURER FOR AIDS LEGAL REFERRAL PANEL, 701-1200, appearing for DEFENDANTS AND RESPONDING PARTIES
JOHN HANLIN FOR HANLIN, WANG KOSTMAYER & ASSOCIATES, 627-7938, APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY

ARGUED AND The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JAMIN YEUNG'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement. SETTLEMENT ENFORCED, ANY DEFAULT BY PLAINTIFF WAS CURED WHEN DEFENDANT ACCEPTED LATE TENDER OF $2,300.00. THE COURT HAS NO AUTHORITY TO MODIFY THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ENTITLED TO POSSESSION OF THE UNIT AS OF 12/31/06 AND DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PAY PLAINTIFF THE DECEMBER RENT OF $1,800.00. Order AND JUDGMENT signed in open Court. (302/PB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOHN HANLIN, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF JAMIN YEUNG
JONATHAN DEGOOYER, LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY FOR DEFENDANT THOMAS BOWERS, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE SETTLES; PARTIES ENTER INTO A WRITTEN AGREEMENT WHICH IS NOT FILED WITH THE COURT; PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL JOHN HANLIN HANDS THE COURT A NOTARIZED POWER OF ATTORNEY AGREEMENT SIGNED BY HIS CLIENT MS. JAMIN YEUNG. SETTLEMENT PLACED ON THE RECORD; COUNSEL JOHN HANLIN READS THE WRITTEN AND SIGNED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING: IT IS STIPULATED THAT DEFENDANTS THOMAS BOWERS AND SHERRY HAN SHALL MOVE OUT OF 2422 24TH AVE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94116. PARTIES AGREE THAT THE VACATE DATE SHALL BE BY 12:00PM DECEMBER 31, 2006. PAYMENT FOR RENT SHALL BE $1800.00 FOR NOVEMBER, WITH PAYMENT BEING MADE BY NOVEMBER 1, 2006 AND $1800.00 FOR DECEMBER, WITH PAYMENT BEING MADE BY DECEMBER 1, 2006; WITH A TOTAL PAYMENT OF $3600.00. PAYMENT IS TO BE SENT TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL MR. JOHN HANLIN AT 901 MARKET ST, SUITE 450 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103. EACH PARTIES ARE TO BARE THEIR OWN COSTS OF ATTORNEY FEES. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT

JUDGE PRO TEM: WILL CHEN; CLERK: SHERIFE HUSENY; REPORTER BELDON YEE #2647 (218)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-11-2006 Text Ruling
